protocols.Paper_title: Development of nucleic acid extraction-free one-step real-time RT-PCR for diagnosis of SARS-CoV-2 infection
protocols.Evidence: “Lysis buffers were prepared…supplemented with…Triton X-100 and…Tween-20… incubated at room temperature…; …‘lysis’… added in…rtRT-PCR.”

protocols.Paper_title: Development of nucleic acid extraction-free one-step real-time RT-PCR for diagnosis of SARS-CoV-2 infection
protocols.Evidence: “viscous solution was…precipitated…after centrifugation, followed by washing with 70% ethanol…drying…at RT.”

protocols.Paper_title: Development of nucleic acid extraction-free one-step real-time RT-PCR for diagnosis of SARS-CoV-2 infection
protocols.Evidence: “Triton-X100 and Tween 20 were used in lysis buffer… The sample swabs were thoroughly mixed with lysis buffer, and lysate was then subjected to rtRT-PCR”

protocols.Paper_title: Development of nucleic acid extraction-free one-step real-time RT-PCR for diagnosis of SARS-CoV-2 infection
protocols.Evidence: “A lysis solution was prepared using Tween-20, Triton X-100, EDTA, and Tris buffer (pH 7.4)… optimize a lysis buffer… for direct quantitative PCR.”
